Private Alpha

Look at you go

Hours logged, invoices sent, payments coming in. Dash shows you the pulse of your freelance business — and it feels great.

Try the demo Get access
Dash

How it works

1
Track your hours per project with a simple weekly view
2
Generate and send professional invoices with one click
3
Forward incoming invoices by email — amounts, VAT, and supplier are extracted automatically

Features

Email invoice forwarding

Forward invoices to your personal inbox address. PDF attachments are scanned with OCR, plain-text invoices are parsed automatically. No manual data entry.

Invoicing

Create and send professional PDF invoices. Track payment status at a glance.

Time tracking

Log hours per project with a clean weekly view. Import from Toggl with one click.

VAT overview

Get a clear overview of VAT to collect and pay. Ready for your quarterly filing.

Bank integration

Connect your bank to automatically sync transactions and match payments to invoices.

Client management

Manage clients, projects, and rate types in one place.

Client portals

Share time overviews with clients via secure links.

Privacy-first

Your data stays yours. Self-hosted in Europe, no tracking, full GDPR export.

Try Dash

Explore the demo environment — no account needed.

Open demo

Get access

Dash is currently in private alpha. Join the waitlist to get early access.
